block.title: Setup the Recorded Future app for Splunk ES
block.text: Configure your Recorded Future API key. If you do not have one, please contact sales@recordedfuture.com or your account representative.

Enter proxy information if that is required to access https://api.recordedfuture.com from the Splunk server (example: https://proxy.example.com:8080). As per Splunk requirements only https proxies are allowed. Leave blank if the access is direct.
Enable debug logging to increase the amount of logging done by the app. All logs are in $splunk_home$/var/log/TA-recorded_future/.
